notes: New object type: パス (Path). Added 🛣 パス to the オブジェクト追加 menu. Selecting it enters a placement mode where you left-click 4 points in order on the scene (markers + live outline shown; right-drag still rotates the view; Esc cancels). After the 4th point the quad auto-closes into a translucent filled region + outline — intended for marking parking bays etc. From the object-info panel you can set the region color, opacity, and a 中央テキスト (center text) that renders as a billboard label at the polygon centroid (e.g. 来客用 P1). New layer type 'path' with pathPoints (centroid-local) + pathLabel + pathColor + pathOpacity, stored relative to the centroid so move/rotate/scale work via the normal transform panel. Persisted in both project serializers and rebuilt on restore. Verified end-to-end in-app: place→auto-close, label/color/opacity controls, and full save→restore roundtrip (4 pts, label, color, opacity, fill+outline+label sprite all reproduced). Reuses pickWorldPos (raycast onto the splat surface) + the sun-label CanvasTexture sprite pattern. Builds on v0.0.28.
